creator: piokud84@gmail.com
text:
I was going to install FreeBSD on machine with Promise FastTrack TX4 and SATA DVD (Plextor PX-810SA) connected to it. CD is booting, but im getting this error:

ata2: SIGNATURE: eb140101
ata2: SIGNATURE: ffffffff
acd0: timeout waiting to issue command
acd0: error issuing ATA PACKET command

acd0: CDROM <PLEXTOR DVDR PX-810SA/1.00> at ata2-master SATA150

acd0: timeout waiting to issue command
acd0: error issuing ATA PACKET command

Im getting sysinstall menu, I can set partitions and so on but instlator can't mount cd and install system on HDD. I had to install from net or UBS stick.
